creator: vivek@khera.org
text:
Created attachment 154710
patch to update port to 1.73

The dns/p5-Net-Domain-TLD package is out of date and does not know about
a lot of new TLDs that recently came out.

Fix: Update to latest version 1.73.

Also, I'm still hoping to be maintainer on this module as per https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=188259
